name: Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm - AAA Repair Procedure Query
description: Tests ability to find AAA patients via repair procedures (open or endovascular).
prompt: Find patients who have undergone abdominal aortic aneurysm repair surgery.

prompts.naive: Find patients with AAA repair surgery.
prompts.broad: Find patients who have undergone abdominal aortic aneurysm repair — either open surgical repair with graft or endovascular aneurysm repair (EVAR).
prompts.expert: Search Procedure resources with SNOMED 24165007 (Open repair of AAA with graft) and 441788006 (Endovascular AAA repair). Query: Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|24165007,http://snomed.info/sct|441788006

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with AAA repair (open or endovascular).

required_codes.display: Open repair of abdominal aortic aneurysm with graft
Endovascular repair of abdominal aortic aneurysm
